name: iPayX
one_line: Rail-agnostic FX forensic audit layer that detects hidden bank markups on B2B cross-border payments.
self_serve_detail: Get a free API key/Bearer token from ipayx.ai; mid-market rate tools work with no key, but live provider comparisons and full forensic reports require the free Bearer token from the dashboard.

name: QuickBooks
one_line: Cloud accounting/bookkeeping platform with a broad REST + GraphQL API for QuickBooks Online.
self_serve_detail: Create a free Intuit Developer account, create an app to get Client ID/Secret, and use free sandbox companies + the OAuth 2.0 Playground for testing; production keys require app review only if you publish to the app store.

name: Xero
one_line: Cloud accounting platform with a broad REST API for small-business finance and payroll.
self_serve_detail: Sign up for a free Xero developer account, register an app to get client id/secret, and develop against the free demo company; OAuth 2.0 is required for all new integrations.

name: Ramp
one_line: Corporate cards and spend-management platform with a developer API for expenses, bills, reimbursements, and travel.
self_serve_detail: In a Ramp account (free for businesses; admin access) go to Company → Developer → Create New App for Client ID/Secret; Client Credentials grant for own-org access, sandbox via demo-api.ramp.com. Third-party multi-org connections use the partner Applications flow.
api_surface: REST broad (expenses, bills, reimbursements, travel, apps)

name: Otter AI
one_line: AI meeting notetaker that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items from conversations.
self_serve_detail: Public API is limited to Enterprise workspaces; API keys are created self-serve under Integrations → Developer, but access must be enabled by your Otter account manager if the feature is not visible in your workspace.
api_surface: REST limited (channels, conversations, transcripts, audio, webhooks)
blocker: Requires an Enterprise (paid) Otter workspace and account-manager enablement to access the API.
